insight: OutgoingMessage.toByteArray() can return null when any single data field exceeds Java's DataOutputStream.writeUTF 64KB limit (e.g. items with massive NBT like Brewery potions in a Shulker Box serialized as hover components). All callers of toByteArray() must null-check the result. The external caller in ProxyEvents.handleConnect() was a missed spot in the original code.
